title: Particle Generators
description: This mod adds Redstone activated particle generator blocks that can be used for decoration or ambience.
body:
This mod adds Redstone activated particle generator blocks that can be used for decoration or ambience. So far, the mod adds the Helionite Skys dimension, which is where you can find the four types of helionite ore. The four varieties can be mined with an iron pickaxe for it's fragment. The fragments can be used to make the particle blocks. These blocks can be used under lava for particles. 

After the current particle generators receive a Redstone signal, they will spawn in particles respective to their type. For example, the fire particle generators create a lot of fire themed particles such as the flame particle. The idea is every time a Redstone pulse is received a new group of particles will spawn in.

After a Redstone signal is received the bocks will spawn in several particles based on the block type.

This mod is in it's early stages.

Also, this mod was made using MCreator.
